free_text: Neutron total cross section and resonance parameters of
Time of flight, 78.2-m flight path and about
and a 6Li-glass scintillator for low energy neutrons
Converted to new date formats, lower case.
The resonance parameters were obtained from a fit of
the cross-section as a function of the resonance
energy.  The contributions of 56Fe and the strong
resonances of 54Fe were taken into account.
Data produced from J. Harvey files by D. Wiarda.
Data for 12.953 b/atom sample not available.
